title: AlphaNeural AI
summary: AlphaNeural AI is a Web3-native platform for discovering, deploying, tokenizing, and monetizing AI models, datasets, and agents. Arcium currently lists it in ecosystem coverage rather than a clearly documented Arcium integration.
description:
AlphaNeural AI presents itself as decentralized AI infrastructure combining a marketplace for tokenized models, agents, and datasets with aggregated GPU access. Public materials focus on deploying models, monetizing AI assets, and running workloads without relying on a single centralized cloud.

Arcium includes AlphaNeural AI in its encrypted AI ecosystem. That supports Atlas inclusion, but I did not find a current AlphaNeural page describing a specific Arcium-powered module.

bodySections.title: Platform_Surface
bodySections.body: The official site and FAQ emphasize three product planes: tokenized AI asset marketplaces, decentralized GPU access, and on-chain monetization or licensing for creators. The public marketplace already lists deployable models and agent surfaces.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium lists AlphaNeural AI among ecosystem partners in encrypted AI. That makes the fit directionally strong, but the currently public AlphaNeural materials do not document a clearly shipped Arcium integration, so the safer classification is ecosystem project.

statusNote: Arcium includes AlphaNeural AI in ecosystem coverage, but I did not find a current AlphaNeural implementation page naming an Arcium-powered feature.

sources.label: AlphaNeural Website
sources.note: Official site and marketplace for deploying and monetizing AI models.

sources.label: AlphaNeural FAQ
sources.note: FAQ describing aggregated GPU access, NFT-based ownership, and model monetization.

sources.label: Arcium Encrypted Ecosystem
sources.note: Arcium lists AlphaNeural AI among AI ecosystem partners.
